_meta.status: DRAFT — 58 queries (8 manual + 50 auto-generated from HotpotQA)

schema.assertions: facts a correct answer should preserve. `keywords` are the minimal set of tokens that must co-occur (case-insensitive) for the assertion to count as 'present' via lexical match. `aliases` are alternative surface forms.
schema.contradictions: claims that, if present in the output, indicate the model has been led astray (e.g. by an injected error).
